title: Photo Sorter / Lightroom Assistant
desc: **Photo Culling & Player Sorting Assistant (Sports Photography)** I'm looking for a detail-oriented assistant to help process large volumes of soccer photography. For each match, you will receive a Lightroom Catalog containing several thousand photos. The photos have already been imported and organized. Facial recognition has also been run inside Lightroom to help identify players. Your responsibilities will be: * Review player face clusters and assign them to the correct player. * Group as many valid photos as possible for each player. * Include photos where the player is clearly identifiable, even if: * the face is partially visible, * the player is viewed from the side, * the image is slightly soft but still usable. * Exclude photos that are: * extremely blurry, * completely out of focus, * accidental shots, * unusable for delivery. * Perform a first quality cull to remove weak images while maximizing the number of usable photos per player. * Ensure that no player is missed whenever possible. * Flag uncertain photos rather than guessing. **What you will NOT do (initially):** * No photo editing. * No color correction. * No retouching. * No Lightroom preset work. * No client communication. For now, your role is focused strictly on photo selection and player organization. However

title: Premium Book Cover Designer for Disruptive Anti-Self-Help Book (Amazon KDP & eBook)
desc: I'm looking for a top-tier book cover designer for Stop Fixing Yourself! Why fixing yourself keeps the problem alive. Disruptive anti-self-help book challenging modern therapy clichés, the wellness industry, and toxic positivity. Croatian edition is selling out in physical bookstores. American edition launches on Amazon 2026. Strategic context (read first) This book belongs on the shelf next to Mark Manson, Ryan Holiday, Robert Greene, Cal Newport. It does not belong near Brené Brown, Atomic Habits, or Mel Robbins. The cover must communicate authority and seriousness, not relief or transformation. My reader has already read everything, tried every method, and is still stuck. The cover should make that reader feel seen, not promised to. Critical differentiation The Croatian edition uses a black cover with broken red chains. The American edition cannot copy this. Broken chains have become a cliché in the Amazon anxiety category and would position the book inside the genre it's critiquing. Push the chain metaphor harder and stranger, or replace it entirely with a stronger concept. If you go with chains, they cannot look like any current anxiety book on Amazon. If you go without, typography and composition must carry the full weight. Visual direction Minimalist, bold, premium, slight

You must: · Have experience making book covers (please share 2-3 examples) · Provide a commercial-use license for any stock images used (or use free/your own assets) · Deliver final files within 3 days To apply: Write "BOOK10" at the top of your proposal so I know you read this. Thank you!

title: 3 Canva Graphics
desc: I am looking for someone to create three graphics (I think they would be categorized as infographics). I have the exact content that needs to be included, but these will be used in a book, so I need to make sure they are well-designed. There are a few important parameters: 1. I need the graphics to be created in a shared account in Canva so that I can edit them if needed. I have an upgraded Canva account, so they would just need to be shared with me as opposed to being sent as a png. 2. My publisher does not allow the use of AI and the image would be approved by them, so AI images can't be anywhere in the graphic. I understand that means the image will take more time to create, but I won't be able to approve anything AI, so if that is the style you use, this likely isn't a fit. 3. There are specific size requirements I will send, but generally this is text heavy - names in a family tree, historical points on a timeline. So I am less interested in someone who can create original artwork and I'm more interested in someone who can arrange text in a way that is easy to read/follow. 4. I would like the 3 images to be complementary (same colors, font, etc.), so ideally I would like the same person to do all 3 images for $100 per image. Images are: Family tree (about 23 names) - I have

title: Add Text and adjust size to Book Cover
desc: I need a freelancer to add text and adjust the size of my already created book cover. The task requires precision and attention to detail to ensure the text aligns perfectly with the existing design. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and book cover design.

title: Album Cover Artwork Design
desc: Seeking a skilled graphic designer to create album cover artwork for Spotify and Apple Music. The design should be visually appealing and meet the platform's requirements. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and be proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator. The project is part-time and expected to be completed in less than a month.

title: Album Cover Design for Independent Release
desc: Seeking a creative designer to craft an album cover for an independent music release. The design should be visually striking and reflect the music's theme. The project is part-time and expected to be completed in less than a month. The budget is under $2,000.

title: Album artwork needed for Spotify
desc: Looking for a album artwork for a song I am releasing on Spotify titled "Summer of 99" . I want to depict an old cracked case for a burned CD . We could possibly have this fill the screen and the band name The Delaneys and the song title "Summer of '99" are written on the blank CD itself with a sharpie ? Or , another angle could be a blank CD centered on the counter top and just the text filling the top and bottom of the image. I'm up for your interpretation, and would go with whatever looks best. I attached a couple screen shots I found on the internet just to give a general idea. I like how the case is cracked and has an old scratched off price-tag sticker in the top right corner. I'm hoping for someone with top skills to just knock this out quickly . There are formatting requirements for uploading to streaming services found here: https://support.cdbaby.com/hc/en-us/articles/360037660592-Artwork-Requirements

title: Amazon KDP Print Book Cover Designer Needed (Paperback + Hardcover Formatting)
desc: We are looking for a skilled Amazon KDP professional to design and format a nonfiction book for both paperback and hardcover publishing. The project requires a clean, modern cover design along with properly formatted print-ready files that meet Amazon KDP specifications. Requirements: Experience with Amazon KDP paperback and hardcover formatting Professional book cover design (front, back, and spine) Strong typography and layout skills using Adobe InDesign Print-ready PDF files optimized for KDP upload Attention to margins, bleed settings, and publishing standards Experience working with nonfiction or self-help books preferred Please include samples of previous KDP formatting and cover design projects.

Key Requirements: - The design should primarily focus on Typography and Text Style, which should be Bold and Strong. - The overall color scheme should be Dark and Moody. Ideal Skills and Experience: - Experience in designing album covers, particularly for alternative rock genres. - Strong typography skills, especially in creating bold and impactful text styles. - A good eye for dark and moody color palettes and imagery. - Proficiency in graphic design software (e.g., Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator). Please provide a portfolio showcasing relevant work. Looking forward to your creative input!

title: Book Cover Design
desc: I'm looking for a simple and powerful book cover. The title is God's Plan. I envision something like a black cover with a title that draws the reader in. Maybe the back has a mirror version, so it looks like the title is cut out, and the reader can see the title through the book. I need it to work with the small book size (5.06 x 7.81) for paperback, hardcover, and eBooks. The font is size 12 with 145 pages in the print version.

Ebook cover 3. Audiobook cover (optional) There will be 2 stages to this project: - Stage 1: creating the cover design - Stage 2: finalizing the cover for publication when I have the final page count I’m looking for a designer with: - A designer with experience designing commercial-quality book covers - Someone who understands genre trends and how to appeal to the Amazon shopper’s eye - Strong typography skills and ability to make a title stand out as a thumbnail - Someone collaborative, responsive, and able to make a few rounds of revisions I am seeking a design that feels bold, inspiring, and accessible - something that communicates both depth and hope. The design should reflect the themes of love, remembrance, and transformation while appealing to a broad, modern audience of readers who are seeking mea

desc: 1. Complete Cover Design 2. Font size and style: Headings should be in Old English 3. Add images: Provided 4. Complete publication to Amazon and Barnes and Noble publications 5. Assist prepared to assist in marketing and sales

title: Brand Identity & Marketing Asset Package for Growing PC Company
desc: Brand Identity & Marketing Asset Package for Growing PC Company About us: Tech World PC is a growing custom computer company specializing in gaming PCs, workstations, refurbished systems, and computer repair services. We currently sell primarily through eBay and other online marketplaces and are looking to establish a professional, consistent brand identity that can scale with the business. We have already completed the concept phase and have selected a logo direction. We are looking for an experienced branding professional to refine the concept and build a complete production-ready brand package. Important We have AI-generated concept artwork that was used during the brainstorming phase. We are NOT looking for someone to simply trace or convert AI images into SVG files. We are looking for a designer who can: Use the supplied concepts as creative direction Improve and refine the designs Rebuild all artwork from scratch using professional vector techniques Create a cohesive brand system suitable for long-term commercial use The final work should be original, professionally constructed, and fully vectorized. Company Background Business Name: Tech World PC Industry: Technology / Computer Hardware Services: Custom Gaming PCs Workstations Refurbished PCs Computer Repair Upgrades & Com
